code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from"react";import axios from"axios";import"./App.css";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function App(){const[status,setStatus]=useState(null);const[products,setProducts]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{const API=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL;axios.get(API).then(res=>setStatus(res.data)).catch(err=>console.error(err));axios.get("".concat(API,"/api/products")).then(res=>setProducts(res.data.products)).catch(err=>console.error(err));},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"App",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"\uD83D\uDED2 eCommerce Store"}),status&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"status",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h3",{children:["\u2705 ",status.message]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["DB Time: ",new Date(status.database_time).toLocaleString()]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Products"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"products",children:products.map(p=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:p.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["$",p.price]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{children:"Add to Cart"})]},p.id))})]});}export default App;
